column8: They have got a lot of cakes, but they have few bread.
column9: - Will she busy next week?- No, she won't.
column10: Deborah has had this piano since five years.
column11: It is often snow in December.
column12: I am going to come early. I promise.
column14: What is this policemen doing now?
column15: Once upon a time it was an old man who was a boaster.
column16: It is a very nice flat. I am sure we shall be very comfortably.
column17: I think we shall be able leave this place on Sunday.
